title: Lead Investment Banker at Oriental Insurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Oriental Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Oriental Insurance in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Oriental Insurance:
Oriental Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oriental Insurance!
